raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Dahwids palikte Jerusale-
mē. Un Joabs kawe Rabbu /
un iſpohſtija to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids nehme win-
na Rehnixa Krohni no winna
Galwas/ un atradde/ ka tas wee-
nu Talentu Selta fivehre/ ir dahri-
gi Akmini bija eekſch ta/ un tas
tappe Dahwidam us Galwn
likts/ winſch arri iſwedde tohti
Dands Laupijuma no Pilſſahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winſch iſwedde tohs
Laudis/ kas ceſſch ta bija / un
fahgeja tohs ar deſſa Sahgeem
puſcham/ un likte tohs appakſch
deſſa Wahgeem un Asminxeem.
Un ta darrija Dahwids wiſſeem
Aminon Behrnu Pilſſahteem.
Tad atgreſſahs Dahwids ar wiſ-
fein Laudim atpakkat us Jeru-
salemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz to pazeblahs Ratſch
ar teem Wilistexeem Gasera/ tad
kawe Sibekajus tas Uſatiteris
Sibaju/ kas no to Milsu Lan-
schu Behrneem bija/ un paſem-
moja tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz zehlahs atkaſ Ratſch
ar teem Wilistexeem / un Elka-
nans Jaira Dehls kawe Laëmu
Goliata ta Gatitera Brahli/ ka
Schkehpja Kahts bija ka weena
Reestawa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz bija atkaſ Ratſch
Gattā/ un tur bija weens leels
Wihrś/ tam bija pa ſefcheêm
Pirkſteem (pee Rohkahm un
Rahjahm) / diwideſſmits un
tſchetri par wiſſu/ un tas bija ar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ridsan no teem Milsu Laudim
dſimmitis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas apnehdiia Israe-
lū / bet Jonatans / Simejus/
Dahwida Brahka Dehls ka-
we to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee bija no Milsu Lau-
dim Gattā dſimmitischi/ un krit-
te zaur Dahwida Rohku / un
zaur winna Kalpo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
Dahwids/ us ta Satana Skubbinaschanu leek
tohs Laudis ſkaitiht : 1. Tohp no Deewa
johdihts/ ka feptindeſmits tuhkſtoſchi Wihrī
Mehri nomirſt; 14. Luhds preekſch teem
Laudim : 16/17. Uppure tam KUNGam :
26. Un dabbu Sohdibas Atlaſſchanu : 27.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas Satans stahwe-
Me ja prett Israēlu / un
ſkubbinaja Dahwidu /
ka tas Israēlu liktu ſkaitiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us
Joabn/ un us to Lauschu Wirf-
neekrem : Eita/ ſkaitajt Israēlu/
no Bersabas lihds Dannai / un
atneffeet tohs pee man/ ka es win-
no Pulkı finnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Joabs : Lat
tas KUNGS pee ſcheein Lau-
dim/ ka tee nu irr / ſints Keift
wairak peeleeſ/ neggi tee wiſſi
mans Kungs Rehnixſch mannam
Kungam par Kalpeem? kapehz
mekle mans Kungıs to ? kapehz
buhs Israētam noſeeqtees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta Rehnixa Wahrdś
makſaja wairak ne ka Jeaba
(Wahrdś.) Tapehz iſgahje Jo-
abs/ un pahrſtaigaja wiſſu Isra-
elu / un nahze attak uhs Jeru-
salemi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
